'''Arbran I''' was a rocky, [[Moon/Legends|moonless]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Arbran]]. It was the innermost planet in the [[Arbran system]],<ref name="Arbra Part 1" /> which was located in the [[Bon'nyuw-Luq sector/Legends|Bon'nyuw-Luq sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Arbra Part 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arbran I was mentioned in "Hole in the Ground," the first article in ''[[Arbra: Sanctuary In the Storm]]'', an online [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] supplement written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. The article was published on [[June 5]], [[2003]], as part of the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' series on [[Wizards.com]].<ref name="Arbra Part 1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Arbran [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Arbran I, in grid square N-17.<ref name="TEA" />
